rationale: Educ. Code §29.188 governs gubernatorial recognition of business partners in career and technology education. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The governor is encouraged to present a proclamation or certificate to each member of the business and industry community that the Texas Workforce Commission, in cooperation with the agency, determines has successfully assisted in the provision of a career and technology education program under this subchapter.
_note: No conflict; rule is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
